Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

SpTU 3, 087 [Sakikku 01][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
o 1o 1

e-nu-ma a-na E₂ lu₂GIG KA!.PIRIG₃ DUku

(o 1) When an āšipu goes to a patient's house:

o 22

* ina SILA ŠIKA zaq-pa IGI GIG BI na-kud la₃ TE-šu₂

(o 2) (If), in the street, he sees a potsherd upright: that patient is critically ill; do not approach him.

o 33

* KI.U₄.BA IGI GIG BI NAM.ERIM₂ DAB-su u₂-za-bal-ma BA.UŠ₂

(o 3) (If) he sees (him) there and then: a curse afflicts that patient; he will linger and die.

o 44

* SIG₄.AL.UR₃.RA IGI GIG BI UŠ₂ : * lu UR.GI₇ GE₆ lu ŠAḪ GE₆ IGI GIG BI UŠ₂1

(o 4) (If) he sees a baked brick: that patient will die : (If) he sees a black dog or a black pig: that patient will die.

o 55

* ŠAḪ GE₆ IGI BA.UŠ₂ : KUR₂ DINGIR-MEŠ BA.UŠ₂

(o 5) (If) he sees a black pig: that patient will die : (variant:) enemy of the gods; he will die.

o 66

* ŠAḪ BABBAR IGI GIG BI DIN! : MUNUS.KALA.GA DAB-su

(o 6) (If) he sees a white pig: that patient will live : (variant:) distress will afflict him.

o 77

* ŠAḪ SA₅ IGI ana ITI 3-KAM₂ : ana U₄ 3-KAM₂ GAM

(o 7) (If) he sees a red pig within 3 months : (variant:) within 3 days: he will die.

o 88

* ŠAḪ GUN₃.A IGI A.GA.A.NU.TIL.LA.A GIG na-kud la₃ TE-šu₂

(o 8) (If) he sees a multicoloured pig: he is sick with dropsy; he is critically ill; do not approach him.

o 99

* ŠAḪ-MEŠ KUN-MEŠ-šu₂-nu IL₂-MEŠ-ma IGI na-kud la₃ TE-šu₂

(o 9) (If) he sees pigs which lift up their tails: he is critically ill; do not approach him.

Reverse
r 1r 1

* ŠAḪ-MEŠ rit-ku-bu-ti IGI GIG BI UŠ₂

(r 1) (If) he sees mating pigs: that patient will die.

r 22

* GU₄ GE₆! IGI ana U₄ 5-KAM₂ : ana U₄ 15-KAM₂ UŠ₂

(r 2) (If) he sees a black ox within 5 days : (variant:) within 15 days: he will die.

r 33

* GU₄ BABBAR IGI ŠU DINGIR-šu₂ : ŠU dNIN.URTA

(r 3) (If) he sees a white ox: hand of his god : (variant:) hand of Ninurta : (variant:) hand of the Divine Twins; he is critically ill; do not approach him.

r 44

: ŠU dMAŠ.TAB.BA na-kud la₃ TE-šu₂

r 55

* GU₄ SA₅ IGI GIG BI UŠ₂

(r 5) (If) he sees a red ox: that patient will die.

r 66

* GU₄ <GUN₃>.A IGI dDIM₃.ME DAB-su :

(r 6) (If) he sees a multicoloured ox: Lamaštu afflicts him : (variant:) a curse afflicts him; he will quickly die.

r 77

NAM.ERIM₂ DAB-su ar₂-ḫiš UŠ₂

r 8-98-9

* GU₄ SI-šu₂ ŠUB-ma IGI GIG BI ar₂;ḫiš UŠ₂ : ana U₄ 7-KAM₂ UŠ₂

(r 8-9) (If) he sees an ox which has thrown its horn: that patient will quickly die : (variant:) within 7 days he will die.

1Line written on the ruling
